raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.7,"R1.2":1.0,"R1.3":0.0,"R1.4":1.0,"R1.5":0.7,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.7,"RX.1":0.7,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":0.7,"RX.4":0.7,"RX.5":0.7},"active_set":["R1.1","R1.2","R1.4","R1.5","R1.6","R1.7","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"rationale":{"R1.1":"Reviewing the section involves assessing and potentially reframing the contribution claim, making conceptual reconstruction central to ensuring clarity of the thesis.","R1.2":"The section presents theoretical arguments and proofs, so verifying logical consistency is load-bearing for the review's validity.","R1.4":"The section claims a novel convergence rate, so assessing novelty against prior work is load-bearing to evaluate the contribution's originality.","R1.5":"Reviewing includes evaluating the narrative arc and organization within the section, making structural reorganization central.","R1.6":"Polishing sentence-level writing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central expectation in reviewing a draft section.","R1.7":"Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage is central, as the section references prior works and builds upon them.","RX.1":"The review should check for proper disclosure of uncertainties in the theoretical claims, making this central to responsible assessment.","RX.2":"Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing in reviewing the contribution statements to ensure accurate representation of results.","RX.3":"Ensuring the section adheres to its stated scope of selection in LLM pipelines is central to the review.","RX.4":"Assessing potential downstream harms from LLM aggregation methods is central, given the AI context.","RX.5":"Verifying provenance of ideas through accurate attribution is central to maintaining traceability in the theoretical analysis."}}

rationale.R1.1: Reviewing the section involves assessing and potentially reframing the contribution claim, making conceptual reconstruction central to ensuring clarity of the thesis.
rationale.R1.2: The section presents theoretical arguments and proofs, so verifying logical consistency is load-bearing for the review's validity.
rationale.R1.4: The section claims a novel convergence rate, so assessing novelty against prior work is load-bearing to evaluate the contribution's originality.
rationale.R1.5: Reviewing includes evaluating the narrative arc and organization within the section, making structural reorganization central.
rationale.R1.6: Polishing sentence-level writing for grammar, flow, and conciseness is a central expectation in reviewing a draft section.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage is central, as the section references prior works and builds upon them.
rationale.RX.1: The review should check for proper disclosure of uncertainties in the theoretical claims, making this central to responsible assessment.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims is load-bearing in reviewing the contribution statements to ensure accurate representation of results.
rationale.RX.3: Ensuring the section adheres to its stated scope of selection in LLM pipelines is central to the review.
rationale.RX.4: Assessing potential downstream harms from LLM aggregation methods is central, given the AI context.
rationale.RX.5: Verifying provenance of ideas through accurate attribution is central to maintaining traceability in the theoretical analysis.
